change_notes: Phase 3.2 adopts its own validation catalog IDs and runner compatibility token instead of reusing Phase 3.1 naming.
The legacy bank-only acceptance scenarios remain the backward-compatibility baseline for no-constraint behavior.

turns: My target profile is Income 140, CCAvg 7.7376709303, Family 2, Education 2, Mortgage 32, CDAccount yes, Online yes, SecuritiesAccount yes, and CreditCard no.

Please set Income to 55 and CCAvg to 2.2. Family should be 4, Education 3, Mortgage 120. I do not want a CD account, I do not use online banking, I do not have a securities account, and I do not want a credit card.

scenarios.description: Clarification follow-up that merges and reaches runtime success.
turns: Please set Income to 55 and CCAvg to 2.2. Family should be 4, Education 3, and Mortgage 120.
CD account no, online no, securities account no, and credit card no.

scenarios.description: Clarification follow-up that merges partial data and still needs clarification.
turns: Please set Income to 55 and CCAvg to 2.2. Family should be 4, Education 3, and Mortgage 120.
CD account no and online no.

scenarios.description: Explicit contradictory income values should surface a conflict and stop runtime execution.
turns: My target profile is Income 40 and Income 60, Family 2, CCAvg 3.0, Education 2, Mortgage 50, CDAccount no, Online yes, SecuritiesAccount no, and CreditCard no.

scenarios.description: Open-ended advice request outside the supported bank profile contract.
turns: Give me general financial advice about how to optimize my finances.

scenarios.description: Stable runtime reject with deterministic next-step suggestions.
turns: My target profile is Income 30, CCAvg 0.8, Family 2, Education 1, Mortgage 0, CDAccount no, Online yes, SecuritiesAccount no, and CreditCard no.

scenarios.description: Clarification pending followed by an unrelated next message should reset pending state and remain unmerged.
turns: I want Income 40, CCAvg 1.5, Family 3, Education 2, and Mortgage 80.
Give me general financial advice about how to optimize my finances.

scenarios.description: Clarification pending followed by a fresh full profile should reset pending state and execute as a new request.
